$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the Fire Editor wire protocol. Both editor/fire_editor/_generated.py and editor/extension/src/protocol/generated.ts are produced from this file by codegen.py. Never hand-edit the generated files. Bump protocol_version on ANY incompatible change and regenerate both bindings in the same commit (EDITOR_PRD hard rule 6).

hello.doc: Handshake. Client announces its protocol_version; daemon rejects on mismatch.

log.doc: Daemon -> client log line, surfaced in the extension output channel.
